title: Is there a way to be notified/alerted if an integration or automation is deactivated or not working?

posts.author: Amiller (Ashley Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to be notified/alerted if an integration or automation is deactivated or not working? For context, our gmail integration sometimes gets disconnected (without us knowing), and sometimes when a staff member leaves the company automations and integrations they created stop working too. Can the board owner be notified when integrations and automations are deactivated or disconnected?
